note: v408: Budget bills. Repeating bills pick their due date on the calendar again (not a plain number) — but the day is read literally from the picked date, so a bill due the 31st still can't drift to February's 28th; it just falls on the last day in a shorter month. Editing a repeating bill opens the calendar on its next occurrence. The 'Reimbursed pays' field is now labeled 'Reimbursement'.
